nodes.name: White-browed foliage-gleaner
nodes.summary: White-browed foliage-gleaner（Anabacerthia amaurotis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-browed foliage-gleaner。

nodes.name: Scaly-throated foliage-gleaner

nodes.name: Anabacerthia
nodes.summary: Anabacerthia（Anabacerthia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Scaly-throated foliage-gleaner、Montane foliage-gleaner、Rufous-tailed foliage-gleaner等5种鸟类。
